items.title: S01E01 - The Gemini Man (pilot)
items.summary: A government undersea salvage operation is blown up, trapping an agent in the explosion. But a chemical reaction has given the man the ability to render himself invisible. The agent attempts to use this capability to discover who was responsible for the sabotage

infolabels.title: The Gemini Man (pilot)
infolabels.plot: A government undersea salvage operation is blown up, trapping an agent in the explosion. But a chemical reaction has given the man the ability to render himself invisible. The agent attempts to use this capability to discover who was responsible for the sabotage

items.title: S01E02 - Smithereens
items.summary: Sam is assigned to drive a truck transporting a secret fuel additive that can triple fuel economy in cars, along with the man who developed it. Unfortunately, the additive is unstable and explosive and the scientist has sold out and is trying to eliminate Sam and the evidence

infolabels.title: Smithereens
infolabels.plot: Sam is assigned to drive a truck transporting a secret fuel additive that can triple fuel economy in cars, along with the man who developed it. Unfortunately, the additive is unstable and explosive and the scientist has sold out and is trying to eliminate Sam and the evidence

items.title: S01E03 - Minotaur
items.summary: After a scientist is fired for building a doomsday machine, he uses the robot against the government in a blackmail plan

infolabels.title: Minotaur
infolabels.plot: After a scientist is fired for building a doomsday machine, he uses the robot against the government in a blackmail plan

items.title: S01E04 - Sam Casey, Sam Casey
items.summary: A group of spies infiltrates Intersect with a double of Sam, so he turns the tables by taking the imposter's place in the group

infolabels.title: Sam Casey, Sam Casey
infolabels.plot: A group of spies infiltrates Intersect with a double of Sam, so he turns the tables by taking the imposter's place in the group

items.title: S01E05 - Night Train to Dallas
items.summary: A scientist for a government research project is dead, and Sam must find the old man's secretary in hopes of learning how to complete the project

infolabels.title: Night Train to Dallas
infolabels.plot: A scientist for a government research project is dead, and Sam must find the old man's secretary in hopes of learning how to complete the project

items.title: S01E06 - Run Sam, Run
items.summary: Sam is being hunted for the apparent murder of an Intersect agent, and there is video tape to prove it. Only Sam doesn't remember doing it and while on the run, attempts to clear his name.
